original_statement: "Argentina [defending champions] follow close behind [Spain] ... winning the World Cup in more than 10% of the simulations [specifically 10.4% according to the Opta supercomputer for the 2026 FIFA World Cup]."
statement_context: Excerpt from Opta supercomputer tournament simulation analysis published by The Analyst on 2026-06-01. Author Dan Edwards using 10,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: Argentina wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by lifting the official trophy in the final match on or before 2026-07-19 according to FIFA.
source_text_snippet: France, England and Argentina follow close behind, all winning the World Cup in more than 10% of the simulations. ... Argentina (10.4%)
